name: agent-index-filesystem-onedrive
description: Filesystem adapter for Microsoft OneDrive and SharePoint document libraries
author: agent-index

drive_id.description: OneDrive or SharePoint document library drive ID. Omit for user's default drive.

site_id.description: SharePoint site ID. Required for SharePoint document libraries, omit for personal OneDrive.

tenant_id.description: Azure AD tenant ID for the org's Microsoft 365 tenant.

client_id.description: OAuth 2.0 application (client) ID from the org's Azure AD app registration.
